aeo_readiness.summary: The business has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and contact information, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and structured data optimization.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and ratings to build trust and improve search visibility.
Optimize meta tags and headers with relevant keywords for better search engine ranking.
Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions, location-specific information, and FAQs.

gbp_analysis.summary: The business has fundamental Google Business Profile (GBP) elements, but it lacks a verified GBP listing, which is crucial for local search visibility.
critical_issues: No verified Google Business Profile listing found.
Lack of customer reviews and engagement on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information on its website, but it needs to expand its citations across local directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify a Google Business Profile listing with consistent NAP information.
List the business on local directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and industry-specific platforms.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and citations.

schema_gaps: Missing Service schema with detailed service descriptions and provider properties.
No Review schema to showcase customer testimonials and ratings.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and engagement signals.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in the Twin Cities area due to low local search visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing for local SEO keywords.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Building backlinks from local business directories and industry-related websites to enhance domain authority.
